requirement_topic.en: Uganda Grid Connection — 240 / 415 V, 50 Hz and ERA / Utility Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: 乌干达并网接入——240 / 415 V、50 Hz及ERA / 电力公司协调
requirement_topic.zht: 烏干達併網接入——240 / 415 V、50 Hz及ERA / 電力公司協調

summary.en: Uganda uses a 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase, 50 Hz electricity supply. EV charger installations should be planned as grid-connected electrical installations requiring coordination with the relevant distribution utility, historically UMEME and increasingly UEDCL depending on the service area and transition status, and with ERA requirements for electrical installation work and electricity-sector regulation. ERA states that it regulates generation, transmission, distribution, sale, export, and import of electrical energy and that electrical installation works may only be carried out by persons with the appropriate permit issued by the Authority.
summary.zh: 乌干达采用240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz供电。电动汽车充电桩安装应按并网电气安装项目规划，需与相关配电电力公司协调；根据服务区域和运营移交状态，可能涉及历史上的UMEME及逐步接手的UEDCL，并需符合ERA关于电气安装作业和电力行业监管的要求。ERA说明其监管发电、输电、配电、售电、出口和进口电能，并说明电气安装工程只能由持有ERA相应许可证的人员实施。
summary.zht: 烏干達採用240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz供電。電動汽車充電樁安裝應按併網電氣安裝項目規劃，需與相關配電電力公司協調；根據服務區域和運營移交狀態，可能涉及歷史上的UMEME及逐步接手的UEDCL，並需符合ERA關於電氣安裝作業和電力行業監管的要求。ERA說明其監管發電、輸電、配電、售電、出口和進口電能，並說明電氣安裝工程只能由持有ERA相應許可證的人員實施。

standards_or_laws: ERA electricity-sector mandate under the Electricity Act, CAP 157
Uganda utility connection and distribution-network requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is commonly 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Uganda's 240 / 415 V 50 Hz supply requires input-voltage range, protective-device coordination, earthing, metering, and thermal operating review against the Uganda installation environment.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电通常为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。乌干达240 / 415 V、50 Hz供电要求结合当地安装环境确认输入电压范围、保护器件配合、接地、计量和热运行条件。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電通常為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。烏干達240 / 415 V、50 Hz供電要求結合當地安裝環境確認輸入電壓範圍、保護器件配合、接地、計量和熱運行條件。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that charger input ratings cover Uganda 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase at 50 Hz, that installation drawings and protective-device schedules suit the local utility connection, that electrical installation work is performed by ERA-permitted personnel where required, and that load, metering, earthing, surge protection, and power-quality evidence are acceptable to the utility and site owner. A China-only 220 / 380 V design without voltage-range and site-connection review is not Uganda grid-ready.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认充电桩输入额定值覆盖乌干达240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz；安装图纸和保护器件表适合当地电力公司接入；在要求时由ERA许可人员实施电气安装；并确保负荷、计量、接地、防雷浪涌和电能质量证据可被电力公司和场地方接受。未完成电压范围和现场接入审查的中国国内220 / 380 V设计不满足乌干达并网准备要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認充電樁輸入額定值覆蓋烏干達240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz；安裝圖紙和保護器件表適合當地電力公司接入；在要求時由ERA許可人員實施電氣安裝；並確保負荷、計量、接地、防雷浪湧和電能質量證據可被電力公司和場地方接受。未完成電壓範圍和現場接入審查的中國國內220 / 380 V設計不滿足烏干達併網準備要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected electrical installations where ERA installation-permit rules and utility connection requirements apply; exact process depends on site, utility, load, and licence context
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an ERA, UMEME, or UEDCL approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Uganda-ready charger package needs 240 / 415 V 50 Hz rating evidence, utility connection review, ERA-permitted installation planning where applicable, and site-level load, earthing, protection, and commissioning documentation. China domestic grid evidence is not a Uganda approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向乌干达的充电桩资料包须包括240 / 415 V、50 Hz额定证据、电力公司接入审查、适用时的ERA许可安装规划，以及场站级负荷、接地、保护和调试文件。中国国内并网证据不等同于乌干达批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向烏干達的充電樁資料包須包括240 / 415 V、50 Hz額定證據、電力公司接入審查、適用時的ERA許可安裝規劃，以及場站級負荷、接地、保護和調試文件。中國國內併網證據不等同於烏干達批准。
